nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜雨林
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联52种鸟类，包括白喉䳍、巴西穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍等52种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 南美洲
nodes.summary: 南美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联190种鸟类，包括小美洲鸵、大美洲鸵、北山䳍等190种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Amazonian pygmy owl
nodes.summary: Amazonian pygmy owl（Amazonian pygmy owl，学名 Glaucidium hardyi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于秘鲁、南美洲、亞馬遜雨林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 秘鲁
nodes.summary: 秘鲁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联962种鸟类，包括北山䳍、高山斑䳍、丽色斑䳍等962种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Amazonian pygmy owl (Glaucidium hardyi), also known as Hardy's pygmy owl, is an owl found in northern South America and the Amazon Basin

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Amazonian pygmy owl (Glaucidium hardyi), also known as Hardy's pygmy owl, is an owl found in northern South America and the Amazon Basin

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Amazonian pygmy owl occurs in the central and southwestern areas of the Amazonia region

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The population size has not been quantified. Research has shown canopy loss and fragmentation in the Amazon basin due to selective logging. As a canopy-dweller, the Amazonian pygmy owl is likely affected by these changes
